title: Families of Vietnam War Missing Gather to Hear Updates, Share Stories
description: War Department officials pledged to continue searching for the 1,565 service members still missing from the Vietnam War during a meeting with grieving families in Arlington, Va.

body.text: The bedrock of the warrior ethos is that Americans never leave behind a fallen comrade, said Anthony Tata, undersecretary of war for personnel and readiness.

Anthony Tata, undersecretary of war for personnel and readiness, speaks to family members of missing Vietnam War service members in Arlington, Va., June 25, 2026. The event was sponsored by the Defense POW/MIA Accounting Agency.
